test.create_query: CREATE TABLE lazy_final_limit (k UInt64, v UInt64, c UInt8, payload String) ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree ORDER BY k
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO lazy_final_limit SELECT number, cityHash64(number, 1) % 100, number < 50000, toString(cityHash64(number, 11)) FROM numbers_mt(8000000)
INSERT INTO lazy_final_limit SELECT number, cityHash64(number, 2) % 100, number < 50000, toString(cityHash64(number, 12)) FROM numbers_mt(8000000)
test.query: SELECT k, payload FROM lazy_final_limit FINAL WHERE v = 7 LIMIT 100 FORMAT Null
SELECT k, payload FROM lazy_final_limit FINAL WHERE v = 7 ORDER BY k LIMIT 100 FORMAT Null
SELECT count(), max(cityHash64(payload)) FROM lazy_final_limit FINAL WHERE c = 1 FORMAT Null
